_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: Nf2-flag transfected oligodendroglial cells showed a prominent increase in Merlin expression, compared to cells transfected with the vector plasmid DNA pcDNA3.1...the level was highly divergent among cells
details: Stably transfected oligodendroglial cells showed prominent increase in Merlin expression compared to vector control, with variable expression levels among cells
